name: Cornish Hens Proven#al Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a heavy skillet large enough to hold the Cornish hen pieces in one layer.
2. Sprinkle the pieces with salt and pepper. When the oil becomes hot, add the pieces, skin side down.
3. Cook over medium-high heat until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
4. Turn and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Add the onions, leeks, and garlic, and stir until wilted, about 2 minutes.
6. Add the tomatoes, olives, thyme, wine, chicken broth, bay leaf, saffron, Tabasco sauce, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir and scrape the bottom of the skillet to dissolve any brown particles on the bottom.
8. Cover closely and simmer for 10 minutes.
9. Remove the thyme sprigs and bay leaf. If there is too much liquid, reduce the sauce slightly.
10. Sprinkle with basil and serve with mixed vegetables.
